name: driftara-video
description: Driftara Video — standalone video gallery desktop app
author: Driftara Video

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --success command-electron -n server,vite,electron "npm run server" "vite" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5174 && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist-electron', {recursive: true}); require('fs').copyFileSync('electron/worker.html', 'dist-electron/worker.html')" && cross-env ELECTRON_IS_DEV=1 electron .
scripts.build: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist-electron', {recursive: true}); require('fs').copyFileSync('electron/worker.html', 'dist-electron/worker.html')" && tsc -b && vite build
